overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza at night. The scene features large holographic art installations, digital billboards, and transitions from a covered walkway to an open plaza and finally onto a bridge, with rain beginning to fall midway through.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the covered walkway past food stalls

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
small food stall with illuminated signage and red accents
large colorful holographic figure visible in the far distance
staircase with blue neon accent lighting on the steps

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a covered pedestrian promenade at night, with wet paved ground reflecting the ambient lights. Food stalls line the right side while a large colorful holographic statue is visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with holographic displays

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with full sky visibility
character turns slightly left while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade approaching the holographic installations

notable_agents.action: person holding a patterned umbrella walking across the plaza

entered.detail: modern information booth or ticket counter with bright blue neon lighting
elevated walkway or bridge with blue accent lights spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character enters an open plaza with a full view of the night sky. A blue-lit booth structure appears on the left while the colorful holographic statue grows larger on the right, and the character approaches an elevated bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with large holographic art installations and stairs

events.description: character begins ascending stairs in the plaza
rain begins to fall heavily creating reflections on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs toward the large holographic crown installation

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking up the stairs alongside the character

entered.detail: massive holographic projection of a red and gold royal crown floating above the plaza
modern building facade with KEEPING YOU SAFE signage in yellow neon letters

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs in the main plaza, passing beneath an elevated walkway. A massive holographic crown dominates the center of the plaza while the colorful statue shifts to the left, and rain begins to fall, creating dramatic reflections on the wet stone surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy plaza with large digital billboards

events.description: heavy rain continues falling with visible rain streaks in the air

agents.ego_description: walking through the heavy rain past digital billboards on the building facade

entered.detail: large digital screens displaying faces with Regal Pop text in orange frames

segments.scene_description: Walking through heavy rainfall, the character moves past large digital billboards displaying faces on the building facade. The holographic crown shifts to the right side as the character passes it, with the KEEPING YOU SAFE building now prominent directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with city views

events.description: transitions from plaza onto open bridge walkway with railings

agents.ego_description: walking away from the plaza onto a bridge with blue-lit railings toward the city skyline

entered.detail: metal railings with integrated blue LED lighting running along the bridge sides
distant city buildings with scattered lights across the night horizon

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the plaza and steps onto an open pedestrian bridge with blue-lit railings. The heavy rain continues as the city skyline stretches out in the distance, leaving the holographic installations and billboards behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban promenade into an expansive, rain-slicked futuristic plaza. It begins under a covered pedestrian walkway where wet pavement reflects the ambient glow of nearby food stalls and a distant, colorful holographic statue. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide plaza under a night sky, passing a blue-lit booth while the holographic statue looms larger to the right. The camera then follows the ascent up a set of stairs beneath an elevated walkway, where a massive holographic crown dominates the center of the view. Finally, the atmosphere shifts as rain begins to fall, intensifying the dramatic reflections on the wet stone surfaces as the character moves deeper into the plaza.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that gradually opens onto an expansive pedestrian bridge. It begins with the character walking through heavy rainfall past towering digital billboards and a shifting holographic crown, with the KEEPING YOU SAFE building looming directly ahead. As the character moves forward, the dense architecture of the plaza begins to recede, shifting the focus away from the holographic installations. The scene then expands as the character steps onto an open bridge defined by blue-lit railings, leaving the city's commercial facade behind. Finally, the camera reveals a wide view of the distant city skyline stretching out under the persistent downpour.
